## Scope check

This project deliberately excludes some capabilities. Before opening, please confirm:

- [ ] This feature is consistent with the project's scope (see "What's not in scope" in the README)
- [ ] This isn't already tracked in another issue or ADR
- [ ] This is a single, focused change (not a redesign)
